result:
**Goal: Add RLE (Run Length Encoded) pattern file import so users can load patterns from the vast library of `.rle` files found online (e.g., from LifeWiki/ConwayLife.com).**

This is the single highest-leverage feature missing. The app already has a nice set of hardcoded patterns and a save/load system, but it can't import from the standard interchange format used by the Game of Life community. RLE is the most common format — supporting it would unlock thousands of patterns (spaceships, methuselahs, guns, logic gates, etc.) via a simple file open dialog, dramatically expanding what users can explore.
